sn56.130:0.1: SN56:130 Passing Away from the Domain of Ghosts (5)
sn56.130:1.1: … "So too, bhikkhus, those beings are few who, when they pass away from the domain of ghosts, are reborn among the devas. But those beings are more numerous who, when they pass away from the domain of ghosts, are reborn in the animal realm."
